title: Virginia Association of Disability Examiners (VADE) — Constitution & By-Laws
description: Constitution and by-laws of the Virginia Association of Disability Examiners (VADE), the Virginia chapter of NADE in the Mid-Atlantic Region, organized into four regions. The constitution covers name, definitions, purpose, membership, officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary/Treasurer, and a biennially elected Mid-Atlantic Regional Board Member) with mail-ballot elections, board of directors, amendments, and by-laws; the by-laws detail state and regional meetings (annual meeting the second Wednesday of April), state and regional officers, the board of directors, amendments, and finances (state and regional treasuries; 10% of regional activity proceeds remitted to the state).

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Virginia (VADE) Chapter
source.title: Virginia Association of Disability Examiners Constitution & By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document Virginia-Const-ByLaws.doc. The document is a complete constitution plus by-laws. The Finances article has two sections both numbered 'Section 4' in the source (preserved). No adoption/revision date is stated, so temporal_coverage is omitted. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
